codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the double-answer bug in reports.go markResolvedButtonHandler(). A comment was added at line 446 explaining the CLAUDE.md pattern: 'Note: RequireUserAdmin with justCheck=false already answers the callback when user is not admin - don't answer again here.' This prevents duplicate answer errors when RequireUserAdmin has already answered the callback.

summary: The fix for double-answer bug in reports.go is correctly implemented. The comment at line 446 documents the pattern from CLAUDE.md that RequireUserAdmin with justCheck=false already answers the callback, so no second answer should be sent. This prevents the double-answer bug described in VAL-MED-002.
